_doc: Coverage ledger for the audit-loop. The workflow reads this to pick the next dimension (never-run > stale > weight), and writes back convergence state after each round. Edit weights/cadence/lenses freely.

lenses: drive a real substantive coding turn end-to-end; capture first-token + warm latency and whether the answer is correct/complete
drive a general Q&A turn; check it streams, no leaked scaffold, reasonable latency
drive a tool-use turn (read a file / list dir); check the tool actually runs and the reply integrates the result
drive an @mention cross-aspect turn; check the right aspect answers and no double-label
check the app health endpoint, model-load state, and any per-turn errors in logs
tool-execution sandbox: can allow_write/allow_run be escaped, or a tool write/run outside sandbox_root?
path traversal in file tools (read_file/list_dir/glob/write): ../ escapes, absolute paths, symlinks
plugin system RCE: how are plugins loaded/gated; can untrusted input trigger code exec?
SSRF / network egress: research/fetch/knowledge ingest reaching attacker-controlled URLs
secrets & PII handling: keys/tokens/user PII in logs, prompts, persisted rows, or error messages
content_guard bypass: input/output safety filter gaps on any router (/v1, /api, /research, /voice)
SQLite (layla.db) + knowledge_graph.graphml write atomicity, corruption on crash, partial writes
crash recovery / integrity / reaper: are half-finished tasks and locks recovered correctly?
unbounded growth: memory/graph/execution_log/conversation stores without bounds or decay
migrations + schema drift: _MIGRATED flags, backward-compat, isolated_db fixture resets
concurrency: the async task runner, background tasks, llm_serialize_lock, races on shared state
prompt assembly / precedence in system_head_builder (the round-19 HIGH seam): blocks dropped, order, budget truncation, list-vs-string drift
agent-loop tool-calling: wrong-tool selection, loop termination, retry/backoff, max_tool_calls, objective-complete detection
routing / intent classification: fast-path vs reason vs deliberate gating, misroutes, phatic detection
streaming / SSE state machine: desync, abort finalize, done-frame, partial-token handling
config / auto-tune / hardware tiers: clamp logic, potato profile, governor refusals, token budgets
reply leak surfaces: leading/mid-prose aspect labels, control tags, scaffold headers, HTML, on any router
over-truncation: cleaners eating legit content (OKRs, markdown, dialogue examples, code fences)
cross-surface parity: a cleaner fix applied on /agent but missing on /v1, /api, /research, /voice, resume
active-aspect gate edge cases (documented accepted residuals aside)
test health: isolation/global-state contamination (tests that pass alone but fail in the suite), flaky order deps, missing coverage on changed files
dead / orphan modules: unreferenced code, fake placeholders, unused config keys
docs vs reality drift: README/CONFIG_REFERENCE/install docs contradicting the code
dependency / version pins: unpinned or vulnerable deps, packaging honesty
